title: Junior Frontend Engineer
description:
We are looking for a Junior Frontend Engineer to join our team. As a Junior Frontend Engineer, you will be responsible for developing high-quality, scalable, and maintainable frontend applications. Our tech stack includes JavaScript, React.js, and Node.js.

Responsibilities:
- Develop responsive and user-friendly frontend applications using React.js and JavaScript
- Collaborate with backend engineers to integrate APIs and data into frontend applications
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to the improvement of the overall quality of the codebase
- Work closely with designers to implement visually appealing and interactive UI components
- Troubleshoot and debug issues in frontend applications

Must-have skills:
- JavaScript
- React.js
- HTML/CSS
- Responsive web design
- Version control systems (e.g., Git)
- Basic understanding of Node.js
- Familiarity with package managers (e.g., npm, yarn)
- Understanding of browser compatibility and cross-browser testing

Nice to have:
- Experience with Angular.js or other frontend frameworks
- Knowledge of testing frameworks (e.g., Jest, Mocha)
- Familiarity with WordPress or other CMS platforms
